---
name: Knowledge source proposal
about: Propose a new authoritative source or an update to the knowledge base
labels: knowledge-base
---

## Source

- Title:
- URL:
- Author or publishing organization:
- Type: vendor engineering guide / peer-reviewed or arXiv survey / standards body / cloud well-architected framework / university course

## Which knowledge document should it feed

(e.g. `knowledge/rag-patterns.md`, `knowledge/security-governance.md`, or propose a new one)

## What it adds

What claims, patterns, or decision criteria does this source support that the knowledge base currently lacks or gets wrong?

## Authority check

Why should designs cite this source? (adoption, peer review, standards status, author track record)
